name: Autonomous Tracking and Terminal Guidance of Moving Targets for Fixed-Wing UAVs
summary: arXiv:2607.12801v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This study introduces a unified control framework for fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) fitted with a pan-tilt (PT) camera, intended to pe...
description: arXiv:2607.12801v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This study introduces a unified control framework for fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) fitted with a pan-tilt (PT) camera, intended to perform an end-to-end mission spanning from initial target detection to accurate terminal engagement. The proposed system employs a three-phase strategy: a vision-based target acquisition phase, an NMPC...
author: Wei-Hao Liou, Teng-Hu Cheng
